sources.name: HMRC Overseas Trade — food (HS 02, 04, 07, 08, 10)
sources.note: Monthly per-partner trade in meat (02), dairy & eggs (04), vegetables (07), fruit (08), and cereals (10). UK domestic production not yet included; DEFRA self-sufficiency is annual.

sources.name: DEFRA UK Food Security Report 2024 — self-sufficiency
sources.note: UK self-sufficiency ratio by category, used to infer monthly domestic production from monthly net imports: production = SS/(1-SS) × (imports − exports). Per-chapter approximations (meat 75%, dairy 88%, veg 55%, fruit 16%, cereals 85%); ratios shift year-to-year, dashboard uses the latest figures uniformly.

sources.name: Voeten — UN General Assembly Voting Data
sources.note: Used to classify each trade partner into an alignment bucket.

monthly.description: Composite monthly UK food imports across HS 02, 04, 07, 08, 10.

byPartner.description: Per-partner totals summed across all five food chapters.

facets.description: Per-chapter facets: meat / dairy / vegetables / fruit / cereals.
